category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (anti-dust mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to South Korea market (Industrial Safety and Health Act, KOSHA/KMOEL anti-dust mask Type Approval, KS M 6673 방진마스크 특급/1급/2급).

title.en: China-to-South Korea PPE Respirator (Anti-Dust Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入韩国（防尘口罩）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入韓國（防塵口罩）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against South Korean requirements under the Industrial Safety and Health Act (산업안전보건법), KOSHA/KMOEL anti-dust mask (방진마스크) Type Approval, standard KS M 6673 (special / class 1 / class 2 — 특급/1급/2급), mandatory KCs safety-certified protective equipment marking, and the critical anti-dust-mask-vs-medical (KF) mask boundary regulated separately by MFDS.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与韩国要求对照，涵盖《产业安全保健法》（산업안전보건법）、KOSHA/KMOEL防尘口罩（방진마스크）型式认证、标准KS M 6673（特级/1级/2级——특급/1급/2급）、强制性KCs安全认证防护用具标识，以及防尘口罩与医用（KF）口罩（由食品医药品安全处MFDS单独监管）的关键界定。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與韓國要求對照，涵蓋《產業安全保健法》（산업안전보건법）、KOSHA/KMOEL防塵口罩（방진마스크）型式認證、標準KS M 6673（特級/1級/2級——특급/1급/2급）、強制性KCs安全認證防護用具標識，以及防塵口罩與醫用（KF）口罩（由食品醫藥品安全處MFDS單獨監管）的關鍵界定。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, type-approval assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current South Korean law, KS standards, KOSHA/KMOEL type-approval scope, and market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The anti-dust mask (PPE) versus medical (KF) mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、型式认证评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行韩国法律、KS标准、KOSHA/KMOEL型式认证范围及市场监督实践。本文所述的防尘口罩（PPE）与医用（KF）口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、型式認證評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行韓國法律、KS標準、KOSHA/KMOEL型式認證範圍及市場監督實踐。本文所述的防塵口罩（PPE）與醫用（KF）口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: Anti-dust masks (방진마스크) used as occupational respiratory protective equipment in South Korea are 의무안전인증대상 (mandatory safety-certification target) protective equipment under the Industrial Safety and Health Act, requiring KOSHA/KMOEL Type Approval (안전인증) to the standard KS M 6673 with classes 특급/1급/2급 (special / class 1 / class 2) — self-certification is not permitted. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not satisfy the Korean type-approval requirements. A critical boundary: medical KF masks (보건용 마스크, KF80/KF94/KF99) are 의약외품 (quasi-drugs) regulated by MFDS, not occupational PPE — the wrong classification triggers a completely different regulatory route.
answer_first.zh: 在韩国作为职业呼吸防护用具使用的防尘口罩（방진마스크）属《产业安全保健法》下的强制安全认证对象（의무안전인증대상）防护用具，须依据标准KS M 6673取得KOSHA/KMOEL型式认证（안전인증），分为特级/1级/2级（특급/1급/2급）——不允许自我认证。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不满足韩国型式认证要求。关键界定：医用KF口罩（保健用口罩，KF80/KF94/KF99）属由食品医药品安全处（MFDS）监管的医药外品（의약외품），而非职业PPE——错误分类将触发完全不同的监管路径。
answer_first.zht: 在韓國作為職業呼吸防護用具使用的防塵口罩（방진마스크）屬《產業安全保健法》下的強制安全認證對象（의무안전인증대상）防護用具，須依據標準KS M 6673取得KOSHA/KMOEL型式認證（안전인증），分為特級/1級/2級（특급/1급/2급）——不允許自我認證。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不滿足韓國型式認證要求。關鍵界定：醫用KF口罩（保健用口罩，KF80/KF94/KF99）屬由食品醫藥品安全處（MFDS）監管的醫藥外品（의약외품），而非職業PPE——錯誤分類將觸發完全不同的監管路徑。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, type-approval body, or primary legal source preferred. law.go.kr (Korean Law Information Center), KOSHA, KATS/e-나라표준인증, and MFDS official URLs are the primary sources for South Korean legislation and standards. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
